I EXECUTIVE SUMMARY 
I.1 Products covered by this document 
The product BALTICSEA_MULTIYEAR_PHY_003_011 (Product reference: https://doi.org/10.48670/moi-
00013) is a Baltic Sea physical reanalysis  covering the period January 1993 and up to as close as possi-
ble to present at a 1 nm resolution and 56 depth layers varying between 1 – 24 m. The product    pro-
vides daily, monthly and yearly mean fields for the following variables: 
• Temperature 
• Salinity 
• Horizontal velocity 
• Sea Ice 
• Sea level 
• Mixed Layer Depth 
The physical System uses the NEMO4.0 model and assimilates satellite sea surface temperature and in-
situ temperature and salinity profiles. The system is forced by ECMWFs ERA5 atmospheric dataset. 
This reanalysis was released into the Copernicus Marine Service Product Catalogue in March 2023, and 
the dataset included in this Quality Information Document covered the period 1/1 1993 - 31/12 2018 
The product in the Catalogue is extended in time on a yearly basis providing a homogenous time series 
of data. This "final dataset" will be available up to approximately present time minus 1 -2 years; de-
pending on the release of the needed forcing data. To provide a more "close to present" dataset we 
will, from Spring 2025 and onwards, additionally provide a monthly extension of the product with a 
coverage up to present time minus two months. These extensions, called ‘inte

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document (QUID) for the Baltic Sea physical reanalysis product BALTICSEA_MULTIYEAR_PHY_003_011, detailing its production system, validation framework, and results.
